solar_tidal_parameters.distance_semantics: constant circular Sun distance in Earth-Moon distance units
solar_tidal_parameters.model_scope: simple bicircular solar third-body tidal stress model; not SPICE ephemeris validation
solar_tidal_parameters.rate_semantics: Sun inertial mean-motion ratio to Earth-Moon mean motion; rotating-frame phase rate is n_sun - 1
